title: Pattaya Gym Directory — Recently Added
description: Latest verified gyms, Muay Thai camps, dive operators, golf courses and sport venues added to the Pattaya Gym Directory.

items.title: Rambaa Somdet M16 Muay Thai & MMA
items.content_text: Personal camp of Rambaa M16 — Thailand's first MMA world champion (Shooto Flyweight 2009) + Muay Thai legend. Cage on site. 100m from Sor Klinmee.
tags: Nong Prue / East Pattaya (100m from Sor Klinmee)

items.title: ALFA BJJ Pattaya
items.content_text: Pattaya’s first ever dedicated Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu gym. Standalone BJJ academy with Gi + No-Gi classes, all levels welcome. Pure-BJJ environment distinct from multi-discipline MMA gyms.

items.title: Sanit Sport Club
items.content_text: Two-zone Mabprachan club: comprehensive fitness centre + dedicated Muay Thai gym. 1,000+ members. Trainer Kru Rung — 40 years Lumpinee/Rajadamnern. Resident MAX Muay Thai champion Krasuk. 4 daily MT sessions.

items.title: Lumpinee Boxing Stadium (Bangkok day-trip)
items.content_text: World most prestigious Muay Thai stadium. ONE Lumpinee weekly Friday cards (12 bouts) + Fairtex Fight Saturday morning. Day-trip from Pattaya for serious MT students. Tickets ฿1500-4500.
tags: Bangkok — Ramintra Road (1.5–2 hrs from Pattaya)

items.title: Rajadamnern Stadium (Bangkok day-trip)
items.content_text: World first Muay Thai stadium, founded 1945. Almost nightly fight cards. RWS Rajadamnern World Series Saturday flagship (8 fights + free beers). Tickets ฿1,600-4,500. Pair with Lumpinee for canonical Bangkok MT weekend.
tags: Bangkok — Ratchadamnoen Nok Avenue (1.5–2 hr from Pattaya)

items.title: Coco Fitness
items.content_text: Central Pattaya commercial gym on the 4th floor of Mike Shopping Mall. Sea-view cardio, walk-in day passes, towel and locker included, and value monthly pricing.

items.title: Elite Gym & Fitness Pattaya
items.content_text: Modern facility with top-notch equipment. Integrates yoga and other fitness programs.
tags: Sukhumvit Road (between Soi 42 and 44, opposite Soi 65)

items.title: Jetts Fitness Pattaya
items.content_text: 24/7 fitness chain. Royal Garden Plaza branch closed May 2022; Little Walk remains the only Pattaya club. No-contract memberships, modern equipment.

items.title: One-D Yoga Studio
items.content_text: Modern multi-style yoga studio at 571/32 Naklua 16/2 offering daily Hatha, Vinyasa Flow, and Yin classes plus private sessions, workshops, and weekend / weeklong retreats.

items.title: Siam Country Club Pattaya
items.content_text: Multiple championship courses: Old Course (1970, Top 100 world), Plantation, Waterside. Asia's premier golf destination.

items.title: Burapha Golf Club
items.content_text: 36 holes designed for natural beauty (lakes, hills, palms). Hosted 2010 Thailand Open. Top tournament venue.

items.title: Bangpra International Golf Club
items.content_text: Opened 1958 — one of the first golf courses in the Pattaya region. 18 holes, par 72, 1988 renovation.
tags: Sri Racha / Bang Phra (40 km north of Pattaya)

items.title: Mountain Shadow Country Club
items.content_text: Ron Fream-designed 18-hole par-72 golf course halfway between Bangkok and Pattaya, built on a former mango plantation with four rare island greens and 6,722-yard layout.
tags: Halfway between Bangkok and Pattaya / Si Racha

items.title: Pickleball Pattaya
items.content_text: Pattaya's flagship dedicated pickleball facility on Pratumnak Soi 6. Two full-sized courts, paddles, balls, ball machine, strong lighting, and beginner lessons from an English-speaking licensed coach.

items.title: Pattaya Sports Club
items.content_text: Multi-sport sports club with tennis and other facilities. Non-profit, ~4,700 active members.

items.title: Manta Kids Pattaya (IG Center)
items.content_text: Premier kids swim academy. Head coach is former Thai national swimmer. ASCTA-certified instructors. ฿9,900/quarter (10 sessions).

items.title: BOUNCE Pattaya — Trampoline Park
items.content_text: International trampoline park franchise on 6F Harbor Pattaya Mall. Free Jump arena, slam dunk lane, dodgeball, performance airbag, Mini BOUNCE for toddlers. BOUNCE FIT adult cardio classes. Same building as Deep Climbing + Bean Cow.

items.title: KBA Kiteboarding Asia Pattaya (Blue Lagoon)
items.content_text: KBA Pattaya kiteboarding + foiling school at Blue Lagoon Na Jomtien. Pattaya branch of Thailand's leading multi-location chain (also Samui, Phuket, Hua Hin, Phangan).

items.title: Deep Climbing Gym (Harbor Pattaya)
items.content_text: Pattaya's first indoor climbing gym. Air-conditioned, 10m wall, ocean theme. Top rope, auto-belay, lead, bouldering routes.
tags: Na Kluea / North Pattaya — Harbor Pattaya Mall, 8th Floor

items.title: Pattaya Monkey Hash House Harriers
items.content_text: Pattaya hash variation. Runs every 2nd, odd-numbered month, usually 3rd Saturday. ~2.5h duration.
tags: Various (run starting points across Pattaya region)

items.title: Muscle Factory Pattaya
items.content_text: Largest hardcore gym in Pattaya. Multi-floor 3-story Pratamnak bodybuilding institution. Bangkok sister gym. Industrial fans, no AC.

items.title: EasyKart Pattaya Thepprasit (Outdoor Go Kart Track)
items.content_text: Newest go-kart facility in Pattaya. Outdoor 350m beginner + 800m racing tracks. Multi-tier classes: Kids/Regular/Fast/2-Seater. From 480 baht.

items.title: AF Academy Football School Pattaya
items.content_text: From age 3 — youngest accepted in Pattaya football. Multi-location. Russian/English/Thai. Indoor + outdoor fields.
tags: Naklua + Jomtien + Pratumnak + Central Pattaya (multiple training locations)

items.title: Pattaya Park Water & Fun Park (with Tower Jump)
items.content_text: Original Pattaya 1989 complex. Tower Jump (170m zip line from 56th floor) + water park + private beach + amusement park.
tags: South Pattaya / Jomtien border — Soi 12 Thappraya Rd

items.title: Thai Sky Adventures (Tandem Skydiving Pattaya)
items.content_text: Southeast Asia only full-time skydive drop zone. 25+ years. Tandem from 13,000 ft. 60s freefall at 200 km/h. Free Pattaya pickup.
tags: Dropzone 25 km north of Pattaya / Rayong direction

items.title: Royal Varuna Yacht Club
items.content_text: Thailand most prestigious yacht club, founded 60+ years ago. RYA-accredited sailing + powerboating training. World-class regattas (ILCA, OK Dinghy, Optimist, Dart, Hobie, Multihull). Pratamnak Hill clubhouse + pool + boat storage + beach bar.

items.title: Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia's Largest Marina
items.content_text: Southeast Asia largest marina. 455 wet berths + 100 trailer + 30 hardstand. Yachts up to 75m. Award-winning. Top of the Gulf Regatta host. SailBreeze sailing school on-site. Yacht charter + brokerage hub. Customs clearance for international yachts.

items.title: Pattaya Bike and Boat Tours
items.content_text: Guided bicycle + boat tour operator. Quiet back-road routes through real Thai villages, plantations, fishing communities. Small-group English-speaking tours. Bike rental also available. Naklua-based.

items.title: MAX Muay Thai Stadium Pattaya
items.content_text: Pattaya daily Muay Thai stadium near King Power on Sukhumvit Road. Tourist-friendly live fight cards, online ticketing, and current listings that vary between 19:00 and 19:45 starts by date.
tags: Sukhumvit Road — next to King Power Pattaya

items.title: Khao Chi Chan (Buddha Mountain) — Walking & Meditation
items.content_text: FREE public walking + meditation site. Worlds largest cliff Buddha image (109m × 70m, 24-carat gold). 1995-96 royal Jubilee commission. Landscaped gardens.
tags: Na Chom Thian / Sattahip — 20 km southeast of Pattaya
